flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Evangel University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Evangel University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Evangel University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.8k → $16.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Evangel University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.7k → $28.5k).
